stemHtml:
Given the following fuel masses, calculated by the pilot of a light aircraft with the following mass limitations, according to the Limitation section of the Aircraft Flight Manual, what is the maximum traffic load for this flight?

Block Fuel: 890 kg
Trip Fuel: 480 kg
Taxi Fuel: 25 kg

Maximum Structural Take-Off Mass: 5800 kg
Performance-Limited Take-Off Mass: 5650 kg
Performance-Limited Landing Mass: 4700 kg
Today's Flight Dry Operating Mass: 2970 kg
